name: Center Stripe Golf (CSG)
about: Center Stripe Golf (CSG) is a golf training studio specializing in personalized coaching and technology-driven swing analysis. Located in Dacula, GA, the facility offers a comprehensive approach to improvement, beginning with mobility assessments and tailored swing plans for golfers of all levels. Utilizing advanced technology including Trackman and TPI-certified coaching, CSG provides a focused environment for serious golfers looking to refine their technique. The studio's philosophy emphasizes personalized, non-generic instruction to help players achieve their specific golfing goals in a professional setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized coaching based on TPI-certified assessments
Technology-driven swing analysis with Trackman and launch data
Holistic approach starting with mobility and physical capabilities
Non-generic instruction tailored to individual swing mechanics
Structured learning plan broken into three improvement phases

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor with ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for lessons and practice sessions. Club fitting services are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes isn't specified, but the focus is on quality swing practice and coaching rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior-specific TPI certifications and youth coaching programs, making it suitable for young golfers.
